Script to reload FTDI drivers on MacOS 10.9 to fix driver reversion after reboot.

# Purpose
This script is a shell script designed to address a specific issue in MacOS 10.9 (Mavericks) related to USB FTDI drivers. It unloads the original Apple USB FTDI drivers and then clears and rebuilds the system's kernel extension caches. Afterward, it reloads the FTDI USB serial driver from the specified library path. This script is intended to be executed with superuser privileges, as indicated by the use of `sudo` for each command.
